items.title: Introducing Advanced Account Security
items.content: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.
items.contentSnippet: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.
items.summary: 高级账户安全功能发布：推出防钓鱼登录、强化账户恢复机制及增强防护措施，旨在保护敏感数据并防止账户被非法接管。

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.content: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
items.contentSnippet: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.

items.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
items.content: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
items.summary: OpenAI正扩展Stargate项目，构建支持通用人工智能（AGI）的计算基础设施，通过新增数据中心容量来满足日益增长的AI需求。

items.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
items.content: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
items.summary: OpenAI提出一项五部分行动计划，旨在加强智能时代的网络安全。该计划聚焦于两大重点：推动AI驱动的网络安全防御技术普及化，以及保护关键信息系统。

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.content: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.summary: OpenAI通过模型防护、滥用检测、政策执行及安全专家协作等多重措施，保障ChatGPT社区安全，构建可靠的AI使用环境。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.content: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.content: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.summary: OpenAI已通过FedRAMP Moderate安全授权，该认证适用于ChatGPT Enterprise和企业API服务，使美国联邦政府能够安全地采用其AI技术。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.content: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.

items.title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
items.content: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
items.summary: Symphony是一个面向Codex编排的开源规范，旨在将问题追踪器转化为持续运行的代理系统。该方案通过自动化协调流程，显著提升工程产出效率，并有效减少开发者的上下文切换成本。

items.title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
items.content: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.
items.contentSnippet: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.
items.summary: Choco公司利用OpenAI API部署AI代理技术，实现食品配送流程自动化，显著提升运营效率并推动业务增长。该案例深入展示了人工智能在食品分销领域的实际应用成效与影响力。

items.title: Our principles
items.content: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.
items.contentSnippet: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.
items.summary: 本文明确了确保AGI惠及全人类的使命，并介绍了Sam Altman提出的五项工作指导原则。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.content: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.contentSnippet: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.

items.title: What is Codex?
items.content: Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.

items.title: How to get started with Codex
items.content: Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.

items.title: Codex settings
items.content: Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow.

items.title: Working with Codex
items.content: Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.

items.title: Plugins and skills
items.content: Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.

items.title: Top 10 uses for Codex at work
items.content: Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.
items.contentSnippet: Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.

items.content: Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.content: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.
items.contentSnippet: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.

items.title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
items.content: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.

items.title: Workspace agents
items.content: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
items.summary: 本文介绍如何在ChatGPT中构建、使用和扩展工作空间代理，以实现自动化可重复工作流程、连接各类工具并简化团队运营操作。

items.title: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
items.content: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.
items.contentSnippet: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.

items.title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
items.content: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
items.contentSnippet: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
items.summary: ChatGPT推出工作区代理功能，该功能由Codex驱动，可自动化复杂工作流程，在云端运行，并帮助团队安全地跨工具扩展工作。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI Privacy Filter
items.content: OpenAI Privacy Filter is an open-weight model for detecting and redacting personally identifiable information (PII) in text with state-of-the-art accuracy
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI Privacy Filter is an open-weight model for detecting and redacting personally identifiable information (PII) in text with state-of-the-art accuracy

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0
items.content: ChatGPT Images 2.0 introduces a state-of-the-art image generation model with improved text rendering, multilingual support, and advanced visual reasoning.
items.contentSnippet: ChatGPT Images 2.0 introduces a state-of-the-art image generation model with improved text rendering, multilingual support, and advanced visual reasoning.
items.summary: ChatGPT Images 2.0发布，推出先进图像生成模型。该版本在文本渲染、多语言支持和视觉推理能力方面均有显著提升，提供更优质的图像生成体验。

items.title: Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
items.content: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.

items.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
items.content: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.
items.contentSnippet: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.
items.summary: OpenAI协助凯悦酒店集团在全球员工中部署ChatGPT Enterprise，通过GPT-5.4和Codex模型提升生产力、运营效率和客户体验。

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything
items.content: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
items.contentSnippet: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
